changes.change: Removed early return `if (!isLive) return rawSignals` in tier gating useMemo. Tier filter now applied to all signal paths regardless of isLive. rowToSignal already defaults tier_visibility to 'free' so existing live signals pass correctly.

changes: Added EXEMPT_PATHS set (22 auth/commerce/onboarding pages) — these are classified EXEMPT, not SHELL, and excluded from shell rate calculation
Extended LIVE_PATTERNS to match useCms[A-Z]*, useAdmin[A-Z]*, useFeed[A-Z]*, useSignal[A-Z]* hook patterns — fixes 7 CMS admin false positives
Added getPageType() function returning auth | onboarding | commerce | confirmation | content
Added page_type field to all classification results
Updated summary to track exempt count separately from shell count
Shell rate now calculated as shell / scored (excludes exempt) not shell / total
Per-hub breakdown shows exempt count with X suffix
Regression check still only compares SHELL-classified pages against baseline

changes.change: Updated baseline from 65 shells → 21 true shells after exemption + pattern fixes
Updated to include pre-existing useEvents.ts:6 comment ('replacing DEMO_EVENTS stub') — historical comment, not a fake-live surface

fakelive:check.evidence: Fake-live guard passed (85 tracked entries, 0 regressions)

shell:check.evidence: 21 true shells (8.4% of scored pages). 22 exempt. Gate passed. No new shells introduced.
